summary: EC8 Phase 8f full regression run. Backend already confirmed 312/312 by main agent (not re-run here). Frontend: full smoke pass across EC0-EC7 + Phase 8a-8d (all 23 core pages load without crash/console errors, no regressions from 8e backend edits). Deep-tested Phase 8e as primary risk area: Equipment list/create/detail(tabs)/archive-button all work; Work Order Requirements card edit + AssignDialog block(rose,non-overridable,Save disabled)/warning(amber, override_reason required, 'Assign anyway') behave EXACTLY per spec including mixed block+warning scenario and warning-only override-success scenario (both verified live against the seeded Work Order d31305ad); Training Definitions/Assignments tabs and assignment detail dialog (manual actions: mark failed / cancel) work; Certifications Matrix (issue/renew/revoke dialogs) and All Certifications tab (revoke with reason, list auto-refreshes) work. Employee Portal Dashboard new Training/Certifications cards render correct counts with working 'View all' links; My Certifications read-only list correct. FOUND ONE CRITICAL BUG: submitting the employee-portal quiz (My Training assignment detail quiz form) returns HTTP 500 every time - this is a hard blocker on the entire quiz-taking flow (attempt history, pass/fail, retry-after-fail can never be exercised because no attempt can ever be submitted). Also found one medium UI staleness bug on the Certifications Matrix 'Issue' dialog (doesn't refresh after successful issue - shows stale 'Missing' until manual page reload, though the underlying data does save correctly) and a minor a11y console warning (missing DialogTitle) on the Training assignment detail dialog.

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error on every quiz submission. RCA confirmed from backend logs: app/services/training_service.py line 271 `correct = sum(1 for q in questions if answer_map.get(q["id"]) == q.get("correct_index"))` raises KeyError: 'id' because quiz question dicts stored on the Training Definition do not have an 'id' key (answer_map is built from `ans['question_id']` at line 270, implying questions should be looked up by the same 'question_id' key, not 'id'). This completely blocks the employee-portal quiz-taking flow end-to-end (no quiz can ever be scored/passed/failed, so pending-signoff/completed/failed/attempt-history states and the quiz retry-after-fail fix mentioned in the review request can never be reached via the UI).

ui_bugs.issue: After successfully issuing a certification via the Matrix cell dialog, the dialog does not refresh/close - it keeps showing the stale pre-issue state ('Missing' badge) and the underlying matrix cell also stays 'Missing' until a full page reload. Data IS persisted correctly server-side (confirmed 'Active/Certified' status after manual reload) - this is purely a missing re-fetch/state-update after the mutation, not a data-loss bug.

Console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users' fires twice when opening the Training assignment detail dialog. Minor a11y gap, not a functional blocker.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend correctly renders the quiz form, question, radio options, and shows the 500 error toast, but there is no user-facing indication of WHY it failed (generic 'Request failed with status code 500'). Once the backend bug above is fixed, recommend verifying the frontend error toast still surfaces cleanly.

action_items: CRITICAL - Fix training_service.py line 271: change `q["id"]` to `q["question_id"]` (or whatever the actual quiz question key is - verify against the quiz-builder's question creation schema in TrainingDefinitionDialog.jsx / training service create/update methods) so quiz scoring no longer raises KeyError. This blocks EC8 Phase 8e closure - the quiz flow (a headline Phase 8e feature) is currently 100% broken end-to-end via the UI.

After the above fix, re-verify: quiz submit succeeds, score/pass-fail computed correctly, attempt history displays, and the previously-verified 'quiz retry-after-fail fix' in training_service.py actually works via the UI (could not be exercised in this session because no attempt can ever complete).
MEDIUM - CertificationsPage.jsx: after Issue/Renew succeeds in the Matrix dialog, re-fetch the matrix data (or close the dialog) so the UI doesn't show a stale 'Missing' state.
LOW - Add DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden-wrapped DialogTitle) to AssignmentDetailDialog.jsx to resolve the Radix a11y console warning.
No other action items - all other Phase 8a-8e flows tested passed, and no regressions detected on EC0-EC7 or Phase 8a-8d from the 8e backend service edits.
critical_code_review_comments: The AssignDialog (GenerateWorkOrderDialog.jsx) block-vs-warning rendering is implemented correctly and matches the backend 409 response shape exactly: hard-block equipment (Forklift #1, required_no_override) renders rose/non-overridable with Save disabled even when mixed with an overridable warning (Laminator A expired cert) in the same assign attempt; when only the warning-level issue is present, the amber card + required override_reason textarea + 'Assign anyway' button appear and the override succeeds and is recorded (confirmed via audit trail entry 'work_order_certification_override' visible on the dashboard activity feed). This is solid, well-tested logic on the frontend side.

The Certifications 'All Certifications' tab correctly re-fetches and shows the row status update to 'Revoked' immediately after a revoke action with no page reload needed - inconsistent with the Matrix tab's Issue dialog which does NOT do this, suggesting the two components use different data-fetching/invalidation patterns for what should be the same underlying resource. Worth unifying the refresh pattern between CertificationsPage's Matrix and All-tab implementations.

The quiz submission bug (KeyError: 'id') is a straightforward key-name mismatch bug, very quick fix, but its complete blocking of quiz-taking (a headline Phase 8e feature) makes it a hard blocker for formal EC8 closure sign-off - recommend this specific fix + retest before closing EC8.

success_rate.backend: not re-run this session (main agent reported 312/312); 1 new critical runtime bug found via UI-driven backend call not covered by pytest suite
success_rate.frontend: ~90% (1 critical blocker in quiz flow, 1 medium UI staleness bug, 1 minor a11y warning; all other flows across EC0-EC7 and EC8 8a-8e passed)

test_credentials: Used AUTH_DEV_BYPASS dev-login for Dev Shop Owner + POST /api/dev-tools/mint-employee-portal-login (fresh token minted per test run since magic-link tokens are single-use) + POST /api/portal/auth/magic-link/verify per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. All credentials matched what test_credentials.md documented; no gaps found in that file.
seed_data_creation: No net-new persistent seed data created for regression purposes. Temporarily edited the seeded Work Order (d31305ad-6339-4d9d-8234-668d45fd4fed) requirements to isolate the warning-only override path, then restored required_equipment_ids to include both Forklift #1 and Laminator A (original state) afterward. Issued a real certification for 'Jamie Rivera' on 'Forklift #1' via the Matrix 'Issue' dialog (data persisted, left in place - dev sandbox), then revoked it again via the All Certifications tab revoke flow with a TEST_ reason (also left in place, dev sandbox, non-destructive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8e frontend UI (Equipment, Training defs/assignments list+detail, Certifications Matrix/All, Work Order Requirements+AssignDialog block/warning/override) is now fully regression-tested and works correctly EXCEPT the quiz submission 500 bug (training_service.py:271 KeyError 'id') which is a hard blocker - once fixed, someone must re-verify: quiz pass/fail scoring, attempt history rendering on MyTrainingAssignmentDetailPage.jsx, and the previously-claimed 'quiz retry-after-fail fix' (could not be reached in this session since no attempt can complete). Also worth a quick fix+retest for the Certifications Matrix Issue-dialog stale-state bug. EC0-EC7 and Phase 8a-8d showed zero regressions from the 8e backend service edits (work_order_service.py assign(), training_service.py/certification_service.py list-enrichment, employee_portal_service.py invite_employee) - light smoke pass across all 23 nav-linked pages showed no crashes or console errors.
rca_of_the_issue: Quiz submission 500: POST /api/portal/employee/training/assignments/{id}/quiz -> portal_employee.py submit_my_quiz -> training_service.submit_quiz_attempt. Line 270 builds answer_map keyed by ans['question_id'] (from the frontend-submitted answers list). Line 271 then tries to look up each quiz question's score by q['id'] - but the training definition's quiz_questions list stores questions without an 'id' key (confirmed via traceback: KeyError: 'id'). The question dict's actual identifier key is presumably 'question_id' (matching the naming convention used for the answer_map), so line 271 should read `answer_map.get(q['question_id'])` instead of `q['id']`. This is a one-line fix, but it 100%-blocks quiz completion via any path (UI or API) since it fires on every single submission regardless of question count or answer correctness.
